nasb.text: Now why do you delay? Get up and be baptized, and wash away your sins, calling on His name.’

esv.text: And now why do you wait? Rise and be baptized and wash away your sins, calling on his name.’

cnv.text: 現在你為甚麼還耽擱呢？起來受洗，求告他的名，洗淨你的罪吧。’

ccb.text: 现在你还等什么呢？起来求告祂的名，接受洗礼，洗净你的罪。’

csbs.text: 现在你还等什么呢？起来，当受洗！求告他的名，当洗去你的罪孽！’
